title: bidens tripartita var. radiata
intro: Bidens tripartita var. radiata is a variety of the Bidens tripartita plant, commonly known as three-lobe biddens or three-lobed biddens, which is a flowering plant in the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Bidens tripartita var. radiata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Bidens tripartita var. radiata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
